content.en:
In just one realm era, Ye Tian had mastered another Supreme Ancestor Technique, and at this rate, it would definitely not be long before Ye Tian wanted to step into the third level of the Supreme Ancestor.

"I have already mastered two Supreme Ancestral Techniques, and the next third Supreme Ancestral Technique will choose the Eternal Supreme Ancestral Technique!"

Ye Tian decided.

This Supreme Ancestral Technique is the Extreme Ancestral Technique of Time, and it is necessary to comprehend another Eternal Ultimate Ancestral Technique.

As a result, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the origin rules of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, and used the replication body to stimulate the derivation characteristics again and again, causing the replication body to collapse again and again.

Under such circumstances, Ye Tian quickly created an Eternal Ultimate Ancestral Technique that was in line with the rules of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth.

Next, he began to fuse the two Eternal Ultimate Ancestral Techniques to create the Eternal Supreme Ancestral Technique.

This time, it took him a little longer.

As for the reason, Ye Tian also knew.

The same Sacred Heaven and Earth, in order to create the Supreme Ancestral Technique, will become more and more difficult, unless he changes to an Exotic Heaven and Earth.

However, Ye Tian now only has the origin rules of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth in his hands, so it is easiest to comprehend the rules of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, even if he wastes some time, it doesn't matter.

After the years of the two realm eras, Ye Tian successfully fused the two Eternal Ultimate Ancestral Techniques into one Supreme Ancestral Technique.

At this point, Ye Tian suddenly mastered the three supreme ancestral techniques, and his strength skyrocketed.

Moreover, Ye Tian has been refining the resources from the Sacred Heaven and Earth over the years, his cultivation has been constantly improving, his physical body has often transformed three times, and with the increase of the three Supreme Ancestral Techniques, his strength is much stronger than when he just broke through to the Supreme Ancestor.

However, Ye Tian was still a little short of the third level of the Supreme Ancestor.

In fact, the limits of each Supreme Ancestor are different.

In terms of true combat power, Ye Tian was not far from the third level of the Supreme Ancestor, but he was still far from his limit.

Once he really reached the third level of the Supreme Ancestor, he would also be much more powerful than the other third-level powerhouses.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to create the Xeon Ancestral Technique.

In order to create the fourth Supreme Ancestral Technique, Ye Tian spent nearly ten realm eras.

And in order to create the fifth Supreme Ancestral Technique, Ye Tian spent thirty realm epochs.

After spending another sixty realm epochs, Ye Tian created the sixth Supreme Ancestral Technique.

At the same time, the Dark Forbidden Domain has also passed the sixth Dark Calendar, and there are only three Dark Calendar time left, and the fourth catastrophe belonging to the Dark Forbidden Domain will be ushered in.

......

"Now I have mastered the six Supreme Ancestral Techniques, the Hegemony Supreme Ancestral Technique, the Streamer Supreme Ancestral Technique, the Holy Armor Supreme Ancestral Technique, the Void Slash Supreme Ancestral Technique, the Eternal Supreme Ancestral Technique, and the Suppression God Supreme Ancestral Technique. In addition, I have refined countless Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth resources, and now my cultivation has improved high enough. With my current strength, although I have not reached the limit, I am even more powerful than the ordinary third-level powerhouse of the Supreme Ancestor. With my current strength, I can be regarded as the third level of the Supreme Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't know if his strength could protect the Terrans, but he wanted to improve more.

The threat faced by the Dark Forbidden Domain is no less than that of the Holy Domain, and even the Bone Clan may be stronger than the Ten Thousand Beast Holy Sects of the Holy Domain.

And the Bone Clan is actually not a big threat to the Dark Forbidden Domain, the real big threat to the Dark Forbidden Domain is the forces behind the six forbidden places.

Even now, Ye Tian had not tried to enter the six forbidden lands, and the top ancestors of the Dark Forbidden Domain knew very little about the six forbidden lands.

Calamity Black Mountain, Destruction Swamp, Boundless Wall, Sky Sword Tomb, Illusory Dream Realm, Boundless Demon Sea.

These are the six forbidden lands, and they are also the six great forces.

They may not be weaker than the so-called Blood Mist Alliance, but the Dark Forbidden Domain belongs to the New Forbidden Domain, which is protected by the Supreme Rules and cannot be transformed.

The Sanctuary Heaven and Earth will only be targeted by the Blood Mist Alliance after the protection period has passed.

But the Dark Forbidden Realm is too immature, so there is no need to worry about being occupied for the time being.

But if they don't have enough strength, they will also be destroyed, and those powerful forces absolutely don't want to see the rise of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

"I must understand the general strength of the six major forces, otherwise once I wait for the Dark Forbidden Tribulation, I will be very passive!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Looking for those top ancestors of the Dark Forbidden Realm, they almost didn't know what the situation was.

He thought of a force - the Bone Clan!

The Bone Clan has entered the Dark Forbidden Domain many times, and it stands to reason that they understand these six major forces.

So, Ye Tian came to the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones, preparing to trade with the Bone Clan again, and by the way, learn about the situation of the six major forces.

--------------

Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones.

The Bone Clan was very happy about Ye Tian's arrival.

But Ye Tian's strength is strong, and the bone clan naturally doesn't want to offend.

Soon, the Bone Emperor of the Bone Ancestor condensed a wisp of consciousness and descended on the Bone Sea Forbidden Land.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, why are you here again?"

The Bone Emperor was a little annoyed.

"Cangyu Bone Emperor, I also want to trade some resources with your Bone Clan, and by the way, ask about the forces behind the six forbidden lands of the Dark Forbidden Domain. Ye Tian said.

"Not interested in trading!"

Emperor Cangyu refused.

"What if it's the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal?" Ye Tian took out an Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal from the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, and said, "You should be interested in such a good thing, right?"

"Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, this is not your Origin Rule Origin Forbidden Realm's Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, where did you come from?"

The Cangyu Bone Emperor was shocked.

"No matter where it came from, you must be interested, I want to use this Origin Rule Robbery Crystal to trade the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal of your Exotic World, this is a mutually beneficial transaction!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

Anyway, he has two Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals that belong to the Sacred Heaven and Earth, trading one has no effect on him, if he can exchange it for one Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal from the Heaven and Earth where the Bone Clan is located, then he will make a lot of money!

The Cangyu Bone Emperor stared at the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal in Ye Tian's hand, nodded and said, "Your Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal is indeed the one that our Bone Clan does not have, and we are willing to trade." "

Subsequently.

The Cangyu Bone Emperor personally descended to the Forbidden Land of the Sea of Bones and completed the deal with Ye Tian.

"Emperor Cangyu Bone, can you tell me about the six forbidden lands?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I can tell you, but what treasures can you trade with?" asked the Bone Emperor.

"How's my friendship going?"

Ye Tian showed his coercion.

Rumble!!!!!

The coercion that belonged to the third level of the Supreme Ancestor spread, making the Cangyu Bone Emperor tremble.

He could sense that Ye Tian could easily kill him in seconds, and even make it impossible for him to escape.

"The third level of the Supreme Ancestor, how is this possible? Before, you were obviously at the level where you had just broken through to the Supreme Ancestor, how could you step into the third level so quickly???" The Cangyu Bone Emperor was stunned.

It's only been a few dark calendars in the past, and for a supreme-level existence, a few dark calendars are not a long time.

There are many supreme-level exotic powerhouses who have gone through many catastrophes, and they can't improve their strength much, and Ye Tian's progress is too unreasonable.

Knowing Ye Tian's strength, Emperor Cangyu Bone had a different attitude and immediately answered Ye Tian's question.

"Okay, I can tell you the general situation of the six forces!" said the Emperor of the Gloomy Bone.
